mapper.select: SELECT c.category_id, c.code, c.name, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.is_active, c.created_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_store s WHERE s.category_id = c.category_id AND s.is_deleted = 0) AS store_count FROM tb_category c WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order, c.category_id
SELECT category_id, code, name, icon, sort_order FROM tb_category WHERE is_active = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, category_id
SELECT category_id, code, name, icon, sort_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_category (code, name, icon, sort_order, is_active, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, 'admin', 'admin')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_category SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_by = 'admin', updated_at = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_category SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_store WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0
